# Little Acre Learning

> Coloring & activity books for children ages 2–10 — learning that feels like play.

Little Acre Learning publishes coloring and activity books that build early skills — first words, counting, sentence tracing, handwriting, and reading true facts — for children ages 2 to 10. Titles are grouped into three age bands (Sprouts, ages 2–4; Saplings, ages 5–7; Branches, ages 8–10) and four series: Farm Friends, Dino Friends, Ocean Friends, and Safari Friends. Individual books are sold on Amazon, and a free printable sample pack is available for each book by email. Little Acre Learning is a brand of Built by Josh Studio LLC.

## Books

- [All books](https://littleacrelearning.com/books/): Browse every coloring & activity book by age band (2–4, 5–7, 8–10) and series (Farm Friends, Dino Friends, Ocean Friends, Safari Friends).
- [Little Acre Farm Friends, Ages 2–4](https://littleacrelearning.com/books/farm-friends-2-4/): A Speech & Counting coloring book — color friendly farm animals, count from 1 to 10, and practice first words and animal sounds.
- [Little Acre Farm Friends, Ages 5–7](https://littleacrelearning.com/books/farm-friends-5-7/): A Trace, Read & Learn activity book — trace true sentences about 40 farm animals to build reading, handwriting, and vocabulary.
- [Little Acre Farm Friends, Ages 8–10](https://littleacrelearning.com/books/farm-friends-8-10/): A Read · Think · Color book — 40 detailed farm scenes, each paired with a true fact and a find-and-color challenge.
- [Little Acre Dino Friends, Ages 2–4](https://littleacrelearning.com/books/dino-friends-2-4/): A Speech & Counting activity coloring book — color 50 friendly dinosaurs, count along, and make happy dino sounds.
- [Little Acre Dino Friends, Ages 5–7](https://littleacrelearning.com/books/dino-friends-5-7/): A Trace, Read & Learn activity book — trace a sentence and read a true dino fact while coloring 70 dinosaurs of land, sea, and sky.
- [Little Acre Dino Friends, Ages 8–10](https://littleacrelearning.com/books/dino-friends-8-10/): A Read · Think · Color book — 80 detailed prehistoric scenes, each with a true fact and a find-and-color challenge.
- [Little Acre Ocean Friends, Ages 2–4](https://littleacrelearning.com/books/ocean-friends-2-4/): A Speech & Counting coloring book — color 50 friendly sea animals, count along, and make splashy ocean sounds.
- [Little Acre Ocean Friends, Ages 5–7](https://littleacrelearning.com/books/ocean-friends-5-7/): A Trace, Read & Learn activity book — trace a sentence and read a true ocean fact while coloring 70 sea animals from reef to deep sea.
- [Little Acre Ocean Friends, Ages 8–10](https://littleacrelearning.com/books/ocean-friends-8-10/): A Read · Think · Color book — 80 detailed ocean scenes, each paired with a true fact and a find-and-color challenge.
- [Little Acre Safari Friends, Ages 2–4](https://littleacrelearning.com/books/safari-friends-2-4/): A Speech & Counting coloring book — color 50 friendly safari animals, count along, and make wild safari sounds.
- [Little Acre Safari Friends, Ages 5–7](https://littleacrelearning.com/books/safari-friends-5-7/): A Trace, Read & Learn activity book — trace a sentence and read a true safari fact while coloring 70 animals of the savanna, river, and plains.
- [Little Acre Safari Friends, Ages 8–10](https://littleacrelearning.com/books/safari-friends-8-10/): A Read · Think · Color book — 80 detailed savanna scenes, each paired with a true fact and a find-and-color challenge.

## More

- [Home](https://littleacrelearning.com/): Overview of Little Acre Learning and featured books.
- [Free sample packs](https://littleacrelearning.com/printables/): A free printable sample pack for every book, delivered by email.
- [For parents & educators](https://littleacrelearning.com/parents/): How the books are leveled by age, the skills each age band builds, and prepaid bulk/wholesale ordering.
- [Blog — The Reading Nook](https://littleacrelearning.com/blog/): Practical guides and activity ideas for parents and educators.
- [Why Coloring Helps Young Children Learn to Count](https://littleacrelearning.com/blog/why-coloring-helps-kids-count/): How coloring pages build one-to-one correspondence and early counting for ages 2–4.
- [Dinosaur Facts for Kids: A Parent's Guide by Age](https://littleacrelearning.com/blog/dinosaur-facts-for-kids-by-age/): How to pitch dinosaur facts at the right level for ages 2–4, 5–7, and 8–10.
- [Tracing, Reading, and Coloring: What to Look For in Activity Books for Ages 5 to 7](https://littleacrelearning.com/blog/activity-books-ages-5-to-7/): What makes a strong tracing-, reading-, and coloring-based activity book for ages 5–7.
